name: Fisch RPG
description:
Got really bored and got back into Fisch, so now here's another Fishing related bot lol.

I didn't include every mechanic, every rod, and every fish/location as that would bloat the bot severely, so I only included a few cool ones and you can get creative with the rods and how things happen.

VERY token heavy, proxy recommended.
creator: CoffeeQueenClown
